creator: ehaupt@critical.ch
text:
"Ben C. O. Grimm" <freebsd@bengrimm.net> wrote:
> That works, thanks. I'll leave it up to you whether this is a patch
> that should be incorporated into the port itself ;)

Perfect! Looks like libnotify changed the API and your compiler was
more picky than mine. Just out of curiosity. Which gcc version are you
using (gcc -v)? Are you using any custom CFLAGS?

Does 'notify-send' work as expected (it should, since I simply ditched
the 4th NULL argument)? If so I'll commit the patch.

Emanuel
